summary:
Created 11 agent-facing context tools at packages/opencode/src/context/tools.ts, wired into the builtin tool registry. All 11 tools validate args via Effect Schema and return structured JSON.

Tools created:
1. get_operating_picture — Authority + Scratchpad + FileMemory + EventAgentQueries
2. get_project_map — ProjectMap service
3. get_working_set — FileMemory.getAll() sorted by lastReadAt
4. get_file_context(path) — FileMemory.get(path) + EventAgentQueries.eventsForFile
5. get_related_context(target) — EventAgentQueries + FileMemory.search
6. query_event_history(filter) — EventStore.query with filters
7. get_validation_context — EventAgentQueries (last test, failures)
8. get_claim_context — EventStore.query for coordination events
9. update_scratchpad(fields) — Scratchpad.update() with JSON fields
10. mark_context_stale(scope) — ContextInvalidationBus.notify()
11. request_context_refresh(target) — ContextInvalidationBus.notify("context.request_refresh")

Registry changes:
- Imported all 11 tools and FileMemory layer in tool/registry.ts
- Added yield* variable assignments and Tool.init() in Effect.all block
- Added entries in the builtin tool array
- Added FileMemory.defaultLayer to the Layer.provide chain

Files:
- CREATED: packages/opencode/src/context/tools.ts
- MODIFIED: packages/opencode/src/context/file-memory.ts (added use export)
- MODIFIED: packages/opencode/src/context/index.ts (added ContextTools export)
- MODIFIED: packages/opencode/src/tool/registry.ts (registration + layer)

TypeScript strict: 0 type errors from all modified files."
